raw: This pass admits up to 3 people at half the regular admission price per person. Any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price. This pass is an e-ticket which does not need to be picked up at the library . During the school year, the museum is closed on Mondays, unless otherwise noted on their calendar. From June 22 -- September 1, the museum is open 7 days a week with free admission on Friday evenings. Operating hours can be found on the Discovery Museum website . Please be advised, as of 1/7/25 the museum no longer accepts advance reservations for admission.
